highlights.title: Web article import
highlights.description: Import web articles by URL and optionally persist body images during import.

highlights.title: Selection shortcuts and annotation filters
highlights.description: Added selection copy shortcuts, annotation actions, type icons, and sidebar annotation filters.

highlights.title: Focused co-reading
highlights.description: Added focused co-reading with chapter cards, manual assistant assignment, and chapter messages.

highlights.title: Configurable send shortcut
highlights.description: Message send shortcuts can now be configured in Settings and stay consistent in the Reader.
